mapper.select:
SELECT
r.room_no, r.room_title, r.room_thumbnail,
r.category_no, c.category_name,
r.now_users AS current_users, r.max_users,
(r.now_users > 0) AS live, (r.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days') AS new_room, (r.now_users >= r.max_users) AS full, r.room_premium AS premium, r.room_private,
( r.room_private = FALSE AND r.now_users < r.max_users AND r.expired_at > NOW() ) AS joinable,
r.created_at, r.expired_at, rvh.last_visited_at,
NULL::BIGINT AS average_study_seconds
FROM rooms r
INNER JOIN categories c ON r.category_no = c.category_no
LEFT JOIN room_participants rp ON r.room_no = rp.room_no AND rp.user_uuid = #{userUuid}
LEFT JOIN room_visit_histories rvh ON r.room_no = rvh.room_no AND rvh.user_uuid = #{userUuid}
WHERE (
r.user_uuid = #{userUuid}
OR rp.user_uuid IS NOT NULL )
AND r.expired_at > NOW()
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN r.user_uuid = #{userUuid} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
rvh.last_visited_at DESC NULLS LAST,
r.created_at DESC, r.room_title ASC LIMIT 3

SELECT
COALESCE(( SELECT sl.total_seconds::BIGINT FROM study_logs sl WHERE sl.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND sl.study_date = CURRENT_DATE LIMIT 1 ), 0::BIGINT) AS today_study_seconds,
d.dday_no, d.dday_title,
CASE WHEN d.target_date IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE (d.target_date - CURRENT_DATE)::BIGINT END AS remaining_days,
NULL::VARCHAR AS study_resolution
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT dday_no, dday_title, target_date FROM ddays WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND target_date >= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY target_date ASC, created_at ASC LIMIT 1 ) d ON TRUE
WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
r.room_no, r.room_title, r.room_thumbnail,
r.category_no, c.category_name,
r.now_users AS current_users, r.max_users,
(r.now_users > 0) AS live, (r.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days') AS new_room, (r.now_users >= r.max_users) AS full, r.room_premium AS premium, r.room_private,
( r.room_private = FALSE AND r.now_users < r.max_users AND r.expired_at > NOW() ) AS joinable,
r.created_at, r.expired_at, NULL::TIMESTAMP AS last_visited_at,
NULL::BIGINT AS average_study_seconds
FROM rooms r
INNER JOIN categories c ON r.category_no = c.category_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_no, MAX(last_visited_at) AS last_active_at FROM room_visit_histories GROUP BY room_no ) activity ON r.room_no = activity.room_no
WHERE r.expired_at > NOW()
AND r.now_users < r.max_users
AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_interests ui WHERE ui.user_uuid = #{userUuid} ) OR r.category_no IN ( SELECT ui.category_no FROM user_interests ui WHERE ui.user_uuid = #{userUuid} ) )
ORDER BY
activity.last_active_at DESC NULLS LAST,
r.created_at DESC, r.room_title ASC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
r.room_no, r.room_title, r.room_thumbnail,
r.category_no, c.category_name,
r.now_users AS current_users, r.max_users,
(r.now_users > 0) AS live, (r.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days') AS new_room, (r.now_users >= r.max_users) AS full, r.room_premium AS premium, r.room_private,
( r.room_private = FALSE AND r.now_users < r.max_users AND r.expired_at > NOW() ) AS joinable,
r.created_at, r.expired_at, NULL::TIMESTAMP AS last_visited_at,
NULL::BIGINT AS average_study_seconds
FROM rooms r
INNER JOIN categories c ON r.category_no = c.category_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_no, MAX(last_visited_at) AS last_active_at FROM room_visit_histories GROUP BY room_no ) activity ON r.room_no = activity.room_no WHERE r.expired_at > NOW()
AND r.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days'
AND r.category_no IN
#{categoryNo}
AND r.room_premium = FALSE
AND r.room_premium = TRUE
AND r.now_users < r.max_users
AND ( r.room_title ILIKE '%' || #{request.keyword} || '%' OR c.category_name ILIKE '%' || #{request.keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY
r.created_at DESC, r.room_title ASC
COALESCE(activity.last_active_at, r.created_at) DESC, r.room_title ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
r.room_no, r.room_title, r.room_thumbnail,
r.category_no, c.category_name,
r.now_users AS current_users, r.max_users,
(r.now_users > 0) AS live, (r.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days') AS new_room, (r.now_users >= r.max_users) AS full, r.room_premium AS premium, r.room_private,
( r.room_private = FALSE AND r.now_users < r.max_users AND r.expired_at > NOW() ) AS joinable,
r.created_at, r.expired_at, NULL::TIMESTAMP AS last_visited_at,
NULL::BIGINT AS average_study_seconds
FROM rooms r
INNER JOIN categories c ON r.category_no = c.category_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_no, MAX(last_visited_at) AS last_active_at FROM room_visit_histories GROUP BY room_no ) activity ON r.room_no = activity.room_no
WHERE r.expired_at > NOW()
AND r.now_users < r.max_users
ORDER BY
activity.last_active_at DESC NULLS LAST,
r.created_at DESC, r.room_title ASC
LIMIT 10

SELECT r.room_no, r.room_title, r.room_thumbnail,
r.category_no, c.category_name,
r.now_users AS current_users, r.max_users,
(r.now_users > 0) AS live, (r.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days') AS new_room, (r.now_users >= r.max_users) AS full, r.room_premium AS premium, r.room_private,
( r.room_private = FALSE AND r.now_users < r.max_users AND r.expired_at > NOW() ) AS joinable,
r.created_at, r.expired_at, NULL::TIMESTAMP AS last_visited_at,
NULL::BIGINT AS average_study_seconds
FROM rooms r INNER JOIN categories c ON r.category_no = c.category_no
WHERE r.user_uuid = #{userUuid}
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.room_title ASC
